activation_mode.mechanism: Copilot CLI rules load unconditionally at session start; no conditional or manual activation modes documented

auto_memory.mechanism: Copilot CLI does not have an AI-generated persistent memory system for rules

cross_provider_recognition.mechanism: agents_md_instructions: Copilot CLI reads AGENTS.md files following the multi-provider shared format

file_imports.mechanism: No @-import or file inclusion syntax documented for Copilot CLI rule files

hierarchical_loading.mechanism: Copilot CLI supports repo-wide instructions plus path-specific and personal instruction layers with defined precedence

providerExtensions.name: Repository-Wide Custom Instructions
providerExtensions.summary: An always-on .github/copilot-instructions.md at the repo root applies to every request made in that repository's context.

providerExtensions.name: Path-Specific Custom Instructions
providerExtensions.summary: NAME.instructions.md files under .github/instructions/ apply only to requests involving files matching a declared path glob.

providerExtensions.name: AGENTS.md Instructions
providerExtensions.summary: Copilot reads AGENTS.md (and CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md) at the repo root as instructions, following the agentsmd/agents.md community standard.

providerExtensions.name: Personal (Home Directory) Custom Instructions
providerExtensions.summary: $HOME/.copilot/copilot-instructions.md provides user-scoped instructions; COPILOT_CUSTOM_INSTRUCTIONS_DIRS adds search directories.
